_comment: Tier-2 for Kratos dem#3: DEM is always 3D internally — MDPA must use SphericParticle3D even for 2D problems. There is no SphericParticle2D registered. ModelPart.CreateNewElement('SphericParticle2D', ...) raises RuntimeError 'Element "SphericParticle2D" is not registered!'. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
